REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF TERRA NOVA INDUSTRIES, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO RECORD LIS PENDENS BASED ON THIRD AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF ASSERTS THAT A CLAIM FOR SPECIFIC PERFORMANCE OF AN ALLEGED ORAL PROMISE TO PROVIDE A DEED OF TRUST SUPPORTS A LIS PENDENS. HOWEVER, THE ONE CASE PLAINTIFF CITES - HILBERG V. SUP. CT. (1989) 215 CAL. APP. 3D 539 - REGARDS A WRITTEN AGREEMENT TO ACTUALLY BUY A PROPERTY. THE MORE-RELEVANT OPINIONS - UREZ CORP. V. SUP. CT. (1987) 190 CAL.APP. 3D 1141 AND WARDLEY DEVELOPMENT INC. V. SUP. CT. (1989), 213 CAL. APP. 3D 391 - SUPPORT DEFENDANT'S POSITION THAT A LIS PENDENS WOULD BE IMPROPER IN THIS CASE. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED.

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion For Leave To Record Lis Pendens Based On Third Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-20-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Marc Mazer, Esq. (415-421-0730 x3) for Plaintiff/Moving party TERRA NOVA INDUSTRIES.
J. Brian McCauley, Esq. (415-974-1515) for Defendant/opposing party MM Wine Realty.

Both sides ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF TERRA NOVA INDUSTRIES, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION's Motion For Leave To Record Lis Pendens Based On Third Amended Complaint is DENIED. Plaintiff asserts that a claim for specific performance of an alleged oral promise to provide a deed of trust supports a lis pendens. However, the one case plaintiff cites - Hilberg v. Sup. Ct. (1989) 215 Cal. App. 3d 539 - regards a written agreement to actually buy a property. The more-relevant opinions - Urez Corp. v. Sup. Ct. (1987) 190 Cal.App. 3d 1141 and Wardley Development Inc. v. Sup. Ct. (1989), 213 Cal. App. 3d 391 - support defendant's position that a lis pendens would be improper in this case. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
